about:
## About Stream Archive

Your favourite live streams are content gold — don't let them disappear. Our cloud-based platform automatically records and saves broadcasts so you can rewatch them anytime.

### Automatic Stream Recording

Add your favourite streamers and we handle the rest. Stream recording happens automatically in the background — no software to install, no manual scheduling. Streams are captured and saved to the cloud as they happen.

### Watch & Download Anytime

All your saved streams are stored securely on our servers. Access your recordings through our built-in player, download them for offline viewing, or share them with friends.

### Record TikTok, Twitch, YouTube & More

Whether you watch streams on TikTok, Twitch, YouTube, Kick, AfreecaTV, or Pandalive — our cloud-based service has you covered. Record across multiple platforms, all organized in one place.

### No Screen Recorder Needed

Unlike a screen recorder that requires your computer to stay on, our cloud service runs 24/7. No software needed. Streams are recorded automatically even when you're not watching.

### Free to Get Started

Create an account and start saving your favourite streams today. Upgrade to premium for higher quality recordings, unlimited storage, and more features.
